title: Classification of goods and services
paperName: Cambridge International AS Level Economics (P1 & P2)
summary: 9708 AS — private, public, merit, and demerit goods.
learningObjectives: Classify goods by rivalry and excludability.
Explain why markets fail for each type.

simpleExplanation.title: Not all goods are the same
simpleExplanation.summary: Economists classify goods to explain why free markets may over- or under-provide certain products.

sections.content: **Classification of goods** (1.6) leads into **3.1 market failure**. Use a **2×2 grid** for public/private goods.
